companies.notes: Mobile Eats has product/substrate evidence, but no flywheel-readable revenue snapshot, positive gross-profit proof, owner distribution/reporting receipt, or operating-control proof. It is not counted as making money.

notes: This ledger is the mechanical operating-health gate for the holding-company success condition that portfolio companies are making money.
Clear status uses redacted refs only; raw revenue, customer, account, or balance values do not belong in this ledger.
Owner economics terms are separate; this gate proves operating money-making evidence.
next_action: Attach first-customer, redacted revenue snapshot, positive gross-profit, owner distribution/reporting, operating-control, and substrate-share refs before marking any company revenue_clear or profit_clear.
